title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Reiju, Unknown person #2, Pedro, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: CACAD ISLAND CHOCOLA- TOWN

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhAA- AAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So not only are you the daughter of big mom...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you're the one who's going to marry Sanji?! You're that pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some guys have all the luck! She'll make a breath- taking wife! Aaaagh!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: You guys... You're Sanji's crewmates?! No way~!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, now that you mention it, I've seen your face before! You're straw hat luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your crew isn't subordinate to big mom's, is it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did you guys make it past the tarte inspection?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And why are you even here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y... they'll kill you if they find you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're inside Mama's territory now ...and Mama is as scary as they come!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! That's right! You all are scary pirates too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold it! calm down! We have no intentions of being violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: luffy. What shall I do with this woman?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KyaAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: What did I just say, Pedro?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You all are here...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: to take back Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess this isn't exactly what you would call a Consensual marriage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama is a bit bullheaded and stubborn, you see... all her children know that her...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ULTERIOR MOTIVE IS TO EXPLOIT OUR MARRIAGES TO STRENETHEN HER PIRATE CREW.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've all long ago abandoned any dream of freely choosing our own spouses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't! Why don't you just run away?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of my dearly beloved sisters left home in search of a free, independent love. A journey in search of a groom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Speaking of which, I've been wondering about this for a while...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were told that you were the "35th daughter of the Charlotte family."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Does Big Mom Really Have 35 Daughters?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Actually, she has 39 daughters and 46 sons.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All 85 of us are siblings!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our fathers are sort of all over the place. Mama's taken 43 husbands. All told, we're a 128-person family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some of my brothers and sisters already have their own children,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there really are quite a few people out there that carry on Mama's blood...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The foundation and infrastructure for big mom pirate crew is built around..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Our real, actual family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: whereew--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My word... truly, a big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: By the way, have you...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: met Sanji yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Y... yes... just once!)

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
